name: Mejiro Palmer
description: __Height:__ 160 cm A young lady from the renowned Mejiro family, though you might not guess it from her casual, friendly attitude. She's quite a socialite and notices even little changes in the people around her, but having such talented relatives caused her to develop a bit of an inferiority complex. Eventually, she found a way to handle those feelings—run, run, and run some more, smiling all the way. As long as she keeps running ahead, she'll one day forge her own destiny.

name: Michiru Saruwatari
description: Michiru Saruwatari is a young Bushi girl who was saved by Musashi when she was about to be eaten by an Oni.

name: Mikan Shiratama
description: Mikan Shiratama is a character who debuts in the second season of PriPara. She makes her anime debut in Episode 39. Her preferred brand is Silky Heart, and she is a Lovely Type Idol. Mikan is a happy-go-lucky girl with a cheerful personality, who acts like an angel. Even though at first it doesn't seem like it since all she does is follow Aroma around, she has a strong and close bond with her. (Source: PriPara Wikia)

name: Mozgus
description: Mozgus is one of the chief Inquisitors of the Holy See, traveling the world with his group of torturers, sent to root out a violent cult of heretics in the city of St. Albion. He's the main antagonist in the Tower of Conviction, hindering with his excessive religious zeal Guts' efforts in saving Casca. name: Nanaka
description: A young spy and slave for Godwin, who was sent to pose as a maid for House Vandimion. Nanaka is a male beastkin who is often confused as a girl due to his androgynous figure and gender-neutral name. After Scarlet removes his enslavement curse, he sides with her in return.

name: Natsuki
description: Natsuki joined the CrossEyes because she believed they were working to make the world a better place for sorcerers who didn't have useful magic. For a long time she thought she had no magical abilities, but she later found out that she has powerful defensive magic which could repel any attack. She wanted to stay with the CrossEyes and be the Boss' bodyguard, but the Boss had other plans for her.

name: Nifa
description: __Height:__ 165 cm (5'5") Nifa is a soldier in the Survey Corps' Fourth Squad under the command of [Hange Zoe](https://anilist.co/character/71121/Hange-Zoe). Nifa appears to be a loyal and trustworthy member of Fourth Squad, as she is often tasked to record the details of important meetings and entrusted to deliver vital information to others within the Scouting Regiment. name: Rei Aragaki
description: Rei is the daughter of [Joutarou](https://anilist.co/character/184611/Joutarou-Aragaki). She is a fourth grade student. Rei loves ninjas. Rei is a kind and conscientious young girl. She does everything she possibly can to support her father, including cooking and cleaning up around the house. Rei is frequently teased in school due to her famous father, but tries her best to make sure that Jotarou never hears about this bullying. name: Reona West
description: Reona is the younger twin of Dorothy West and is of Canadian (father) and Japanese (mother) descent. Reona is quite shy and would wither away if not for Dorothy.
